A

Accessory - Class in musicstore.model
Represents a musical accessory in the store (strings, drumsticks, cases, etc.) Extends Product adding specific attributes like compatibility and material
Accessory(int, String, double, int, String, String) - Constructor for class musicstore.model.Accessory
Accessory constructor
addProduct(T) - Method in class musicstore.model.Shop
Adds a product to the catalog
Album - Class in musicstore.model
Represents a music album in the store Extends the abstract class Product by adding specific information about an album: artist, genre, and year
Album(int, String, double, int, String, String, int) - Constructor for class musicstore.model.Album
Album constructor

D

deleteProduct(int) - Method in class musicstore.model.Shop
Deletes a product from the catalog by its ID
DialogProduct - Class in musicstore.gui
Modal dialog for adding or editing a product in the catalog Displays different fields based on the selected product type (Album, Instrument or Accessory)
DialogProduct(JFrame, Shop<Product>) - Constructor for class musicstore.gui.DialogProduct
Constructor for adding a new product Generates a new ID from the shop reference
DialogProduct(JFrame, Shop<Product>, Product) - Constructor for class musicstore.gui.DialogProduct
Constructor for editing an existing product Pre-fills fields with the product's current data

E

exportReport(Shop<Product>, String) - Static method in class musicstore.storage.FilesManager
Export a report of the shop's inventory to a text file with the specified path

F

FilesManager - Class in musicstore.storage
Class in charge of data persistence for the store Manages reading and writing the catalog to text files using the classes BufferedReader, BufferedWriter, FileReader and FileWriter from Java system
FilesManager() - Constructor for class musicstore.storage.FilesManager
 
filterByCategory(String) - Method in class musicstore.model.Shop
Filters products by category

G

getAll() - Method in class musicstore.model.Shop
Returns a complete list of products in the catalog
getArtist() - Method in class musicstore.model.Album
Returns the artist of the album

Returns the brand of the instrument

Abstract method to get the category of the product

Abstract method to get the category of the product

Abstract method to get the category of the product

Abstract method to get a detailed description of the product

Abstract method to get a detailed description of the product

getGenre() - Method in class musicstore.model.Album
Returns the musical genre of the album
getId() - Method in class musicstore.model.Product
Returns the unique identifier of the product
getInventoryValue() - Method in class musicstore.model.Shop
Returns the total value of the inventory, calculated as the sum of (price * stock) for all products
getMaterial() - Method in class musicstore.model.Accessory
Returns the material of the accessory
getName() - Method in class musicstore.model.Product
Returns the name of the product
getName() - Method in class musicstore.model.Shop
Returns the name of the shop
getNewId() - Method in class musicstore.model.Shop
Returns a new unique ID for a product, incrementing the internal counter
getPrice() - Method in class musicstore.model.Product
Returns the price of the product
getProductInRow(int) - Method in class musicstore.util.ProductTableModel
Returns the product at the specified row index in the table
getResult() - Method in class musicstore.gui.DialogProduct
Returns the product created or edited in the dialog, if the user confirmed the action
getRowCount() - Method in class musicstore.util.ProductTableModel
getStock() - Method in class musicstore.model.Product
Returns the available stock quantity of the product
getTotalProducts() - Method in class musicstore.model.Shop
Returns the total number of products in the catalog
getType() - Method in class musicstore.model.Instrument
Returns the type of the instrument
getValueAt(int, int) - Method in class musicstore.util.ProductTableModel
getYear() - Method in class musicstore.model.Album
Returns the publication year of the album

I

Instrument - Class in musicstore.model
Represents a musical instrument in the store Extends Product by adding brand, type of instrument, and whether it is suitable for beginners
Instrument(int, String, double, int, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class musicstore.model.Instrument
Instrument constructor
isConfirmed() - Method in class musicstore.gui.DialogProduct
Shows whether the user confirmed the action (accept) or canceled it
isForRookies() - Method in class musicstore.model.Instrument
Indicates if the instrument is suitable for beginners

L

load(Shop<Product>) - Static method in class musicstore.storage.FilesManager
Load all the products from the default CSV file and add them to the shop
load(Shop<Product>, String) - Static method in class musicstore.storage.FilesManager
Load all the products from a CSV file with the specified path and add them to the shop

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class musicstore.Main
Main method that initializes the application, loads data, and starts the GUI
Main - Class in musicstore
Main class of the MusicStore application Initializes the shop with sample data, attempts to load the saved catalog, and launches the GUI
Main() - Constructor for class musicstore.Main
 
MainWindow - Class in musicstore.gui
Main screen of the MusicStore application This class provides a user-friendly interface to manage the product catalog of the music store
MainWindow(Shop<Product>) - Constructor for class musicstore.gui.MainWindow
Main window constructor Initializes the UI and loads the product data from the provided shop
musicstore - package musicstore
 
musicstore.gui - package musicstore.gui
 
musicstore.model - package musicstore.model
 
musicstore.storage - package musicstore.storage
 
musicstore.util - package musicstore.util
 

P

Product - Class in musicstore.model
Abstract class representing a generic product in the music store It is the root of the inheritance hierarchy of the system
Product(int, String, double, int) - Constructor for class musicstore.model.Product
Product constructor
ProductTableModel - Class in musicstore.util
Personalized table model for showing products in a JTable.
ProductTableModel(List<Product>) - Constructor for class musicstore.util.ProductTableModel
Constructor that initializes the table model with a list of products

S

save(Shop<Product>, String) - Static method in class musicstore.storage.FilesManager
Save all the products in the shop to a CSV file with the specified path
searchByName(String) - Method in class musicstore.model.Shop
Searches for products whose name contains the given text (case-insensitive)

Shop<T> - Class in musicstore.model
Generic class representing the music store's catalog Uses Java Generics to work with any type of Product

toCSV() - Method in class musicstore.model.Accessory
Serializes the product data into a CSV format string

Serializes the product data into a CSV format string
